name: Hunt the 5K
stimulus: 3 runs/week at quality. Track speed at 5K pace. Tempo for stamina. Bike maintains aerobic base + Zwift races for competition.

planned.desc:
Zwift — moderate ride

75min Z2:
- Include 4x1min Z3 surges
- Leg opener for track tomorrow
planned.notes: Speed block starts. Keep it easy on the bike.

planned.desc:
Hill-to-track bridge

WU: 2km easy + drills + 3x80m accelerations

SET 1 — Hills: 4x200m uphill @ hard (42sec / 3:30/km pace)
- Jog back down recovery

SET 2 — Track: 4x400m @ 82-84sec (3:25-3:30/km)
- 200m jog recovery

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Last hills of the cycle. Bridge from power to speed.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy spin 40min Z1
PM: Strength 40min (explosive)

Strength:
- Jump squats 3x5
- Bounding 3x6 contacts
- Single-leg hops 3x8/leg
- Core: hanging knee raises, Russian twist
- Ankle/calf work
planned.notes: Explosive strength. Power, not bulk.

planned.desc:
Tempo + speed finish

WU: 2km easy + 4x100m strides

SET 1 — Tempo: 3km @ 4:00-4:05/km
- Continuous, no breaks
- Breathing controlled, rhythmic

3min jog recovery

SET 2 — Speed: 3x400m @ 80-82sec (3:20-3:25/km)
- 200m jog recovery

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Combo session. Tempo builds stamina, 400s build turnover.

planned.desc:
Easy recovery ride

60min Z1:
- Flat, easy
- Flush the legs before long run
planned.notes: Pre-long run. Easy.

planned.desc:
Long run — endurance

Segment 1: 12km @ 5:00/km
Segment 2: 3km @ 4:40/km
Segment 3: 3km @ 4:20-4:30/km

Total: 18km
Fast finish — last 3km should feel like racing
planned.notes: Long run with fast finish.

planned.desc:
Long ride

2.5-3hrs Z2:
- Easy, recovery from long run
- Flat or gentle rolling
- Zwift social ride OK
planned.notes: Easy. No pushing.

planned.desc:
Zwift — threshold ride

WU: 15min Z2
MAIN: 3x8min Z4 (4min Z1 recovery)
CD: 10min Z1

~70min total
planned.notes: Hard bike. Longer threshold efforts this week.

planned.desc:
TRACK — 5K pace reps

WU: 2km easy + drills + 3x100m building to race pace

MAIN: 5x1km @ 3:28-3:32/km
- 90sec jog recovery between reps
- Stay RELAXED: drop shoulders, unclench jaw
- Splits should be even — don't go 3:24 then die

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: THE session of the block. This IS your race pace. Own it.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy bike 40min Z1
PM: Strength 40min

Strength:
- Depth jumps 3x4
- Bounding 3x6
- Single-leg squats 3x6/leg
- Core: rollouts, pallof press
- Ankle strength: band exercises
planned.notes: Plyometric focus. Quick ground contact.

planned.desc:
Progression run — learn to close

WU: 2km easy

MAIN: 8km progression
- km 1-2: 5:00/km (easy)
- km 3-4: 4:40/km (steady)
- km 5-6: 4:20/km (tempo)
- km 7: 4:05/km (threshold)
- km 8: 3:50/km or faster (FINISH HARD)

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Every km faster than the last. The last km should hurt. This builds race closing speed.

planned.desc:
Yoga — recovery

30min:
- Hip openers
- Hamstring stretches
- Calf/achilles work
- Foam roll

Pre-long run mobility

Long run — 10K strength

Segment 1: 14km @ 5:00/km (patience)
Segment 2: 3km @ 4:30-4:35/km
Segment 3: 3km @ 4:15-4:20/km

Total: 20km
Last 6km is building your 10K engine
planned.notes: Longest run. This builds the endurance to hold 5K pace.

planned.desc:
Zwift race — B category

25-40min race effort:
- Race HARD. Compete.
- This keeps bike power up
- Good simulation of race-day stress
+ 15min warmup, 10min cooldown
planned.notes: Race the bike. Keep that competitive edge.

planned.desc:
Easy spin

60min Z1:
- Recovery week
- Easy legs
planned.notes: Absorb week.

planned.desc:
TRACK — sharpener

WU: 2km easy + drills

MAIN SET 1: 3x1km @ 3:25-3:28/km (FASTER than race pace)
- 2min jog recovery
- Should feel quick but not strained

MAIN SET 2: 2x400m @ 76-78sec (3:10-3:15/km)
- 200m jog recovery
- Pure speed

CD: 2km easy
planned.notes: Faster than race pace. Short. Sharp. Leave speed in the legs.

planned.desc:
AM: Easy spin 30min Z1
PM: Strength 30min (maintenance only)

Strength:
- Bodyweight squats 2x10
- Lunges 2x8
- Core circuit 2 rounds
- Light. Don't accumulate fatigue.
planned.notes: Light week. Maintenance only.

planned.desc:
Zwift — easy group ride

60min Z2:
- No racing this week
- Stay controlled
planned.notes: Easy. Pre-race week.

planned.desc:
Pre-race mobility

25min:
- Light movement
- Hip openers, ankle circles
- Breathing focus
- Visualization: see yourself at 3:28/km, relaxed
planned.notes: Sleep well tonight.

planned.desc:
5K TIME TRIAL or PARKRUN

WU: 2km easy + 4x100m strides + 2x200m @ 3:28/km

RACE — 5km, target 17:30-17:45:
- km 1: 3:30 (DO NOT go 3:20 — patience!)
- km 2: 3:28
- km 3: 3:28
- km 4: 3:28
- km 5: EVERYTHING YOU HAVE

CD: 2km easy jog
planned.notes: First test. Even splits. Don't panic if km1 is 3:32 — that's fine. Attack km 4-5.

planned.desc:
Recovery spin

60min Z1:
- Celebrate or regroup
- How did it feel?
- Rate it 1-10
planned.notes: Speed 1 complete. Report back.
